issue.title: GitClaw tools info e2e 20260530T060219Z
issue.body:
@gitclaw /tools info read_file

Live tools-info E2E 20260530T060219Z.

Mention go.mod so the read_file active-output metadata exists.
Hidden tools info token: GITCLAW_TOOLS_INFO_BODY_20260530T060219Z
This should produce a focused deterministic tool info report without dumping raw tool inputs, tool outputs, issue bodies, or comments.
issue.author: AnandChowdhary
